taskId: 20260703-143908-设计-ypi-studio-并行子代理与依赖图调度
message: ### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — 实现 schemaVersion 2 DAG 严格校验、ready batch 选择、blocked 传播、derived progress 刷新、counts/active/queued/nextIds 更新；保留 `selectNext...` 兼容 wrapper；为 implementation/subagent mutation 增加轻量 task 级 in-process lock。 - `scripts/test-ypi-studio-dag.mjs` — 新增 DAG 调度测试，覆盖 serial、parallel、mixed fan-in、缺失依赖/自依赖/重复 id/环、failure propagation、concurrency、legacy pending。 - `scripts/ts-extension-loader.mjs` — 测试脚本用的 TS extensionless import loader。 - `package.json` — 新增 `npm run test:studio-dag`。 #### Verification - `npm run test:studio-dag` — passed - 注：Node 输出 `--experimental-loader` warning，不影响测试结果。 - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed - `npm run test:studio-policy` — passed #### Notes / Risks - 未实现 async runtime/tool/UI，严格限定在 `dag-scheduler-core`。 - task 级 mutex 是进程内轻量锁，只覆盖同一 Node 进程；跨进程文件锁仍留给后续增强。

message: ### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — added approvalGrant fallback lookup by bound `contextIds`; improved approval gate error messages; added `implementation_next(limit)` support; extended claim to support batch `subtaskIds`/`limit`, `queued|running`, `runIds`; allowed update fields `waiting/queued/failed`, `blockedBy`, `terminationReason`. - `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — extended claim/update body types for batch claim and new metadata fields. - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — exposed new `ypi_studio_task` inputs (`limit`, `includeWaitingReasons`, `subtaskIds`, `runIds`, `blockedBy`, `terminationReason`) and wired tool calls to service functions. - `scripts/test-ypi-studio-dag.mjs` — added coverage for batch claim/maxConcurrency and approvalGrant fallback when runtime pointer is missing. #### Verification - `npm run test:studio-dag` — passed - `npm run test:studio-policy` — passed - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed #### Notes / Risks - Di…

message: ### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-subagent-runtime.ts` — 扩展 active child run registry：`subtaskId/status/progress/promise/result/onAbortPersist`，新增 get/update helpers 与 `runtime_lost` projection 入口。 - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — 抽出 `runChildPi` persistence callbacks；运行中同步 registry progress/status；finalizer 支持最终持久化；abort 可 best-effort 写回 cancelled run。 - `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — `recordYpiStudioSubagentRun` 现在将 run final status 映射到 subtask：`succeeded -> done`、`failed/cancelled -> failed`、`waiting_for_user -> blocked`，并刷新 DAG 派生状态。 #### Verification - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed - `npm run test:studio-policy` — passed #### Notes / Risks - 未实现 `ypi_studio_subagent start_async/poll/collect/cancel` 工具接口，按子任务边界保留给后续子任务。 - `recordYpiStudioSubagentRun` 现在会自动更新绑定 subtask 的终态；这支撑 async finalizer，但也会影响现有同步 subtask run 的终态写回，建议主会话/检查员重点确认兼容性。 - Working tree 还有其他前序子任务改动；本轮只处理 async-runtime 相关文件。

message: ### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — extended `ypi_studio_subagent` with `action/mode/runId/runIds/cancelReason`; added async start, poll, collect, cancel handling; preserved legacy sync default. - `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — ensured subtask `currentRunId` is persisted for queued/running subagent runs; removed an unused helper causing lint warning. #### Verification - `npm run lint` — passed - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed - `npm run test:studio-dag` — passed - `npm run test:studio-policy` — passed #### Notes / Risks - No UI changes made. - `collect` marks persisted queued/running runs as `failed(runtime_lost)` if no active runtime handle exists, matching the current in-process registry design. - Existing unrelated working tree changes were present and left untouched.

message: ### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `components/YpiStudioPanel.tsx` — Enhanced Studio task detail UI: - Implementation tab now shows status counts, DAG/execution route, waiting/blocked reason summary, scrollable all-subtask table with filters, running/queued lane, and selected-subtask detail. - Displays `pending` as waiting and surfaces `waitingOn`, `blockedBy`, run ids, termination/error summaries. - Subagents tab now groups runs by status (`queued/running/succeeded/failed/cancelled/waiting_for_user`) and shows run/subtask/progress metadata. - `docs/modules/frontend.md` — Updated YPI Studio panel behavior documentation. #### Verification - `npm run lint` — passed - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed #### Notes / Risks - Browser manual check not run in this delegated environment. - Repository already contained many unrelated modified/untracked files; I did not commit or touch git state.

message: Handoff: - Artifact written: `.ypi/tasks/20260703-143908-设计-ypi-studio-并行子代理与依赖图调度/review.md` Validation run: - `npm run lint` — pass - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — pass - `npm run test:studio-policy` — pass - `npm run test:studio-dag` — pass Key remaining risks: - Blocking: default sync `ypi_studio_subagent` path can bypass `implementing`/approval gate and still write implementation subtask to `running`. - Blocking: `runtime_lost` is only reconciled on `collect`; `poll`/run GET can leave orphan runs appearing `queued/running`. - Non-blocking: async first start double-increments `attempts`. - Non-blocking: resetting subtask to `ready` leaves stale failure/block/run metadata. Decision needed from main session: - Fix the two blocking issues before considering this task complete.
